notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Missed catch error by first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. on the pickoff attempt, assist to pitcher Max Scherzer.

notableEvents.label: Corbin Carroll grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Corbin Carroll hits a grand slam (3) to left center field. Ildemaro Vargas scores. Alek Thomas scores. Ketel Marte scores.
